title: Capability
description: A capability that an agent possesses. Capabilities define what an agent CAN do - tools they can use, actions they can take, or permissions they have.

description.description: What this capability allows the agent to do

category.description: Category of capability: tool (use a tool), artifact_action (CRUD artifacts), store_access (read/write stores), communication (message agents), delegation (delegate work), process (governance/workflow authority)

tool_ref.description: For tool capabilities, reference to the tool-definition this grants access to. Must match a tool ID defined in studio.tools array.

artifact_types.description: For artifact_action capabilities, which artifact types this applies to

actions.description: For artifact_action capabilities, which actions are allowed

stores.description: For store_access capabilities, which stores can be accessed

access_level.description: For store_access capabilities, the level of access granted

targets.description: For communication/delegation capabilities, which agents can be contacted
